rows.label: tev000601_MSG0001
rows.name:
Everything that's ever happened in
this wretched world was all leading
up to this one drink. Aaaaaah...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG0002
rows.name:
Hey, pal! You come here to
raise a glass with ol' Frye?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG0003
rows.name:
The Scotch in this dump ain't
so bad, you know? You should
have one. ...Or three.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1001
rows.name:
You come here to have
another drink with me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1002
rows.name:
What? You're heading off on a mission? Bwa ha
ha! Well sure, go save some lives or whatever.
Heck, I'll come along if you want. Whaddya say?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000601_SEL0011
rows.name: Add Frye to your team.

rows.label: tev000601_JNK0020
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000601_SEL0021
rows.name: Decline Frye's request for now.

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1003
rows.name:
Lemme just pour the rest of my
Scotch into my flask... All right!
I'm geared up and ready to go![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1004
rows.name:
What, you don't want me along?
Pffft. Your loss. Just come find
me when you change your mind, pal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1009
rows.name:
I wonder what kinda booze these
unidentified xenoforms drink?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1010
rows.name:
Guess if I wanna ask 'em, I
gotta save 'em first! Come
on, pal, take me with you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_JNK0030
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000601_SEL0031
rows.name: Add Frye to your team.

rows.label: tev000601_JNK0040
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000601_SEL0041
rows.name: Decline Frye's request for now.

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1013
rows.name:
What, you don't want me along?
Pffft. Your loss. Just come find
me when you change your mind, pal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1018
rows.name:
Urgh... I've been hitting the Scotch nonstop for the last
couple of days, and I got a hangover like you wouldn't
believe. Feels like I've been chewing tennis balls.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1019
rows.name:
It's seriously made my
Blue Blood go all funky.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1020
rows.name:
Got so much liquor on my breath that even the
tainted would be able to smell me coming a mile
away. Think I'd better take a pass on this mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1025
rows.name:
Sounds like Iriina's team hit a rough
patch out in Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1026
rows.name:
They're fellow Interceptor, so I can't just sit here
and drink all day without feeling like I oughta be
helping 'em out, ya know? So come on! Take me along![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_JNK0050
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000601_SEL0051
rows.name: Add Frye to your team.

rows.label: tev000601_JNK0060
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000601_SEL0061
rows.name: Decline Frye's request for now.

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1028
rows.name:
What, you don't want me along?
Pffft. Your loss. Just come find
me when you change your mind, pal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1033
rows.name:
Your next mission's to White
Woods, huh? You know, I've been
there myself a time or two.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1034
rows.name:
Just gimme a flask and a compass, and I'll find you
that piece of the Lifepoint before you can say boo.
Heck, I'll find all the pieces ya want! Whaddya say?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_JNK0070
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000601_SEL0071
rows.name: Add Frye to your team.

rows.label: tev000601_JNK0080
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000601_SEL0081
rows.name: Decline Frye's request for now.

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1036
rows.name:
What, you don't want me along?
Pffft. Your loss. Just come find
me when you change your mind, pal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1041
rows.name:
Heard Vandham's got another mission
for ya. I dunno what it's gonna take
to get that guy off your back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1042
rows.name:
Here, I'll go with you. We'll find a
nice scenic spot and raise a glass or
three to White Woods. Whaddya say?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_JNK0090
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000601_SEL0091
rows.name: Add Frye to your team.

rows.label: tev000601_JNK0100
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000601_SEL0101
rows.name: Decline Frye's request for now.

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1044
rows.name:
What, you don't want me along?
Pffft. Your loss. Just come find
me when you change your mind, pal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1049
rows.name:
Aw, man, I can't believe he made off with that
new Doll AND the Central Life coordinates! I
tell you what—I did NOT see that coming.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1050
rows.name:
Kinda makes sense when you think about it,
though. Guy was a crackerjack Pathfinder, so
it's no surprise he'd make a good traitor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1051
rows.name:
Anyway, we gotta go get all that stuff back, and
fast. There's no way in hell I'm letting that little
sneak get the last laugh! So bring me along, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_JNK0110
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000601_SEL0111
rows.name: Add Frye to your team.

rows.label: tev000601_JNK0120
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000601_SEL0121
rows.name: Decline Frye's request for now.

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1053
rows.name:
What, you don't want me along?
Pffft. Your loss. Just come find
me when you change your mind, pal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1058
rows.name:
I bet Scotch tastes all the better
when it's gliding down the throat
of a flesh-and-blood body.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1059
rows.name:
Aw, just the thought gets me tipsy! So
come on! You gotta take me along, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_JNK0130
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000601_SEL0131
rows.name: Add Frye to your team.

rows.label: tev000601_JNK0140
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000601_SEL0141
rows.name: Decline Frye's request for now.

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1060
rows.name:
Thanks, [ST:playername ]. It means a lot that you'd
bring me on such an important mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1061
rows.name:
Then I'll be drinking to your
victory from right here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1066
rows.name:
It's just been one victory party
after another here at the ol' diner.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1067
rows.name:
Needless to say, the booze has been flowing, and
I've had a glass or two. Or 20. ...Or more, maybe?
Anyway, can't say I ain't starting to feel it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1068
rows.name:
Whaddya say, pal? How 'bout you take me
with you so I can get some fresh air?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_JNK0150
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000601_SEL0151
rows.name: Add Frye to your team.

rows.label: tev000601_JNK0160
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000601_SEL0161
rows.name: Decline Frye's request for now.

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1069
rows.name:
All right! Let's go bang out a mission
or two. That oughta sober me right up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1070
rows.name:
What, you don't want me along?
Pffft. Your loss. Just come find
me when you change your mind, pal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1071
rows.name:
Hey, it's my old pal [ST:playername ]! Why don'tcha take
me along, and... Eh... Never mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000601_MSG1072
rows.name:
I ain't in the mood to fight. I just wanna sit here
and drink my drink. Just enjoy the riches of life
and... whatever else it is I'm doing. Sorry, pal.[ST:wait ]
